items.title: Why Operational Discipline Still Wins in Modern Dealerships
items.summary: An operator-focused argument for why management cadence, process ownership, and daily follow-through remain decisive even as dealership technology stacks become more complex.

items.title: CRM Process Is a Management System, Not Just a Tool
items.summary: Frames CRM as an operating discipline that supports manager coaching, accountability, visibility, and customer continuity rather than simple data entry.

items.title: Fixed Operations Growth Starts with Better Workflow Design
items.summary: A practical perspective on service lane consistency, internal handoffs, customer updates, and the importance of repeatable service processes that teams can actually sustain.
